name: Peninsula Energy Limited
description: Peninsula Energy Limited is an ASX-listed uranium mining company focused on the development and operation of its flagship Lance Projects in Wyoming, USA. As a near-term uranium producer, the company is transitioning the Lance Projects to a low-pH In-Situ Recovery (ISR) operation, which is expected to enhance production efficiency and cost-effectiveness. Peninsula Energy is committed to becoming a sustainable and reliable supplier of uranium to the global nuclear power industry, supporting the transition to carbon-free energy through its strategic asset base and operational expertise.
